meta.title: Arce — A Case Study in Surgical Care · v23 Pacifica
meta.description: The case study: twenty-seven years of oral & maxillofacial surgery in the South Bay. Dr. Jorge Arce, D.D.S.

cells.v: Dr. Jorge Arce, D.D.S. — board-certified implantologist
Dental Implants Center of South Bay — Redondo Beach & Torrance

sections.cap: Frame 01 — the operating room, where the case actually gets decided.

sections.title: Take the cases <s>everyone else</s> refers out.
paras: Complex extractions. Reconstruction where bone and tissue have been lost. Full-arch implant restorations for patients told — sometimes more than once — that nothing could be done.
The brief never changes: difficult work, done with care, gives people their lives back.

sections.title: Precision first. <s>Patience</s> always.
paras: Trained in Colombia, specialized in California. Every case is mapped before anyone operates — implants, grafting, sequencing, restoration. The time the case actually needs, not the time the schedule allows.

sections.title: The <s>footage.</s>
sections.lbl: slots de video — el caso en movimiento

slots.cap: Film 01 — The operating room, real time

cells.l: Devoted entirely to oral & maxillofacial surgery
Dental Implants Center of South Bay founded

cards.q: “I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did.”
“When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make.”
“The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.”

rows.v: Dental Implants · Reconstruction · Complex Cases · Implant Maintenance · Pathology · Second Opinions

sections.title: Your case, <s>next.</s>
